reasoning: The selected Genkit spans wrap provider-neutral registered action callbacks, not a guaranteed outbound transport. In @genkit-ai/core@1.21.0, runInNewSpan receives only action metadata, labels, and the callback; model, retriever, and embedder actions may run entirely in-process and expose no hostname, port, URL, connection, or other peer identity at this boundary. The exact-version sample executes all three client-like operation families with zero network attempts. A real remote peer, when present, belongs to the underlying provider or transport integration, which has the endpoint needed to compute peer.service. Using the Genkit action name as a peer would mislabel local actions and provider-neutral logical names.
